title: athyrium acrocarpum
intro: Athyrium acrocarpum, also known as the lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. Native to Asia and North America, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Athyrium acrocarpum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
